channel.title: math.SP updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: math.SP updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: Localization of eigenfunctions in amenable unimodular random networks
item.description: arXiv:2606.17187v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: For an amenable unimodular random rooted network, we show that the presence of a positive point mass in the expected spectral measure implies that, with positive probability, there exists an eigenfunction with finite support.
item.dc:creator: Georgii Veprev

item.title: Three counterexamples to a conjecture of Colin de Verdi\`ere on multiplicity
item.description: arXiv:2312.03504v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We exhibit closed hyperbolic surfaces of genus $10$, $17$, and $37$ such that the multiplicity of the first nonzero eigenvalue of their Laplacian is larger than the maximum conjectured by Yves Colin de Verdi\`ere in 1986. In order to determine these multiplicities, we apply the twisted Selberg trace formula to the representations induced by the isometry groups of these surfaces on corresponding triangle groups.
item.dc:creator: Maxime Fortier Bourque, \'Emile Gruda-Mediavilla, Bram Petri, Mathieu Pineault
